videos.video_subject: In 2022 Kylian Mbappe verbally agreed to join Real Madrid before performing a shock last-minute U-turn to re-sign with Paris Saint-Germain instead
videos.video_script: In 2022 Kylian Mbappe told Real Madrid he was joining. Contracts were ready. Then, hours before signing, he changed his mind and re-signed with PSG instead, stunning Real Madrid completely.
videos.video_terms: Kylian Mbappe Real Madrid 2022, Mbappe PSG re-sign, Mbappe transfer saga, Mbappe close up interview

videos.video_subject: In 2008 Manchester United rejected a world record bid from Real Madrid for Cristiano Ronaldo, forcing him to stay for one more season before finally being sold in 2009
videos.video_script: In 2008 Real Madrid offered a world record fee for Cristiano Ronaldo. Manchester United said no and refused to sell. Ronaldo stayed one more season before finally leaving for Madrid in 2009.
videos.video_terms: Cristiano Ronaldo Manchester United 2008, Ronaldo Real Madrid transfer 2009, Ronaldo Man United close up, Ronaldo transfer saga
videos.hook_text: MAN UNITED REFUSED TO SELL RONALDO

videos.video_subject: Erling Haaland's contract at Borussia Dortmund contained a release clause of only around sixty million euros, letting Manchester City sign one of football's best strikers for a fraction of his value
videos.video_script: Erling Haaland's Dortmund contract had a release clause of just sixty million euros. Any club could trigger it. Manchester City did, signing one of football's best strikers for a fraction of his value.
videos.video_terms: Erling Haaland Dortmund release clause, Haaland Manchester City transfer, Haaland Dortmund close up, Haaland transfer bargain

videos.video_subject: At just sixteen years old Jude Bellingham was sent off with a red card during his professional debut for Birmingham City, only twenty five seconds after coming on as a substitute
videos.video_script: At sixteen, Jude Bellingham made his professional debut for Birmingham City. Twenty five seconds after coming on, he was sent off with a red card. Years later, he's one of football's biggest stars.
videos.video_terms: Jude Bellingham Birmingham City debut, Bellingham red card, Bellingham young close up, Bellingham Real Madrid
videos.hook_text: BELLINGHAM'S RED CARD ON HIS DEBUT

videos.video_subject: As a thirteen year old at Newell's Old Boys, Lionel Messi was scouted and almost signed by Arsenal before Barcelona won the race by funding his growth hormone treatment
videos.video_script: As a thirteen year old, Lionel Messi was scouted by Arsenal and almost moved to England. Barcelona won the race instead, agreeing to fund his growth hormone treatment if his family relocated to Spain.
videos.video_terms: young Lionel Messi Arsenal scout, Messi Newell's Old Boys, Messi Barcelona signing, Messi young close up
